code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test05-MAY-2022Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, proteinuria, glucosuria, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), suggesting possible renal dysfunction. Low urine specific gravity may indicate impaired concentrating ability. HbA1c is low, which may reflect recent hypoglycemia or anemia. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend further nephrological evaluation and assessment for underlying causes of renal impairment.
